contactsPage.title: Let’s talk about your next release
contactsPage.intro: We respond from the UK and Italy. Share your stack, target market and urgency — we’ll prepare a clear proposal.
contactsPage.formHint: Submissions are sent securely to our team by email.

servicesPage.title: ROI-first: technology in service of the business
servicesPage.intro: Every offer is structured to reduce risk, speed up time-to-value and tie marketing spend to measurable outcomes.
servicesPage.sectorsIntro: We already partner with operating businesses: websites, portals, integrations and digital tools shipped to production in these verticals.

sectors.label: Hotels
sectors.title: Hospitality & direct booking
sectors.description: Projects for hotels and B&Bs: booking engines, multilingual sites, upsells and integrations with channel managers / PMS.
bullets: Fast, mobile-first sites for local and international search
Booking flows and forms with conversion tracking
Hospitality SEO and seasonal content (offers, events)

sectors.label: Food & beverage
sectors.title: Digital menus, orders & brand
sectors.description: Solutions for bars, restaurants and groups: online presence, ordering, loyalty and consistent branding across locations.
bullets: Menus, takeaway/delivery and payment integrations where needed
Landings for openings, promos and local SEO

sectors.label: Logistics
sectors.title: Operations, tracking & integrations
sectors.description: Support for logistics and warehousing: operational dashboards, connectors to back-office systems and visibility for clients and partners.
bullets: Portals and micro-apps for shipment status and notifications
APIs and sync with ERP / WMS
Production monitoring for performance and reliability

sectors.label: Professionals
sectors.title: Professional practices (e.g. veterinary)
sectors.description: Experience with clinics and practices: institutional sites, appointment flows, patient education and privacy-aware design.
bullets: Clear sites for services, hours and emergencies
Appointment request forms and reminders where applicable

servicesPage.quoteTitle: Request a proposal for our services
servicesPage.quoteBody: Describe goals and context: whether you need web, app, cloud, SEO or a combined package. We’ll reply with a clear estimate.

items.title: Websites
points: Landing and corporate sites with performance and accessibility.
Modern stack (Next.js, headless CMS) for speed and SEO.
Analytics, forms and CRM automation integrations.

items.title: Mobile applications
points: React Native and Flutter: one codebase, iOS and Android stores.
Native UX, deep links, push and in-app monetisation.
Release train and crash / ANR monitoring.

items.title: Cloud solutions
points: Infrastructure on AWS / GCP / Vercel with predictable costs.
CI/CD, staging environments, backup and disaster recovery.

items.title: SEO & marketing
points: Technical SEO, structured data and content velocity.
Monthly reports with actionable funnel insights.

visionPage.title: We build products that withstand your market’s tomorrow
visionPage.intro: Our vision is simple: every line of code should support revenue growth, operational resilience and user trust — with a UK and Italy footprint and an international mindset.

pillars.title: Modular architectures
pillars.body: Bounded contexts, versioned APIs and feature flags: evolve the product without blocking traffic or sales.

pillars.title: Horizontal scale
pillars.body: Stateless services, smart caches and async queues for demand spikes and seasonal campaigns.

pillars.title: Time-to-learning
pillars.body: Product telemetry, experimentation platforms and short release cycles: decisions from data, not opinions.

pillars.title: AI-ready stack
pillars.body: Clean data pipelines, embedding stores and guardrails: ready for assistants, semantic search and safe automation.

Metadata.title: Web Agency UK & Italy — Websites, Apps & E-commerce | Alvenco Ltd
Metadata.description: Alvenco Ltd builds websites, e-commerce and mobile apps for businesses expanding between UK and Italy. Based in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire. Free site audit.
Metadata.keywords: web agency UK, web development Hertfordshire, app development UK, e-commerce UK Italy, web agency Bishop's Stortford, React Native app UK, Next.js development UK, Italian web agency UK

Hero.title: The UK–Italy Digital Studio
Hero.subtitle: We build websites, e-commerce and mobile apps for businesses expanding across borders — converting more visitors into paying clients.

Problem.headline: Most sites attract visitors. Few convert them.
Problem.body: If your site isn't bringing you qualified enquiries, the problem isn't traffic — it's strategy. We audit, redesign and rebuild digital presences that actually work.
Problem.stat2_label: Time to receive your free audit
Problem.stat3_label: The only markets we serve — and we know them both

web.title: Websites that generate leads
web.description: From landing pages to full corporate sites. Built to rank on Google and convert visitors into enquiries. Performance-first, mobile-first, SEO-first.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce built to sell
ecommerce.description: Online stores optimised for conversion. UX, speed, and checkout flows designed to reduce abandonment and increase average order value.

mobile.title: Mobile apps with AI integration
mobile.description: Native iOS & Android apps. We build what differentiates you — from MVP to full product. Our portfolio includes a civic AI platform used by UK local authorities.

expansion.title: UK–Italy digital expansion
expansion.description: Operating in both markets means we handle both languages, both legal frameworks (UK GDPR & EU GDPR), and both customer cultures. No other local agency does this.

About.headline: We don't build sites. We build systems that bring you clients.
About.body: Alvenco Ltd is a web and app studio based in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire. Our team operates across UK and Italy — building digital products for businesses that want to grow in both markets.
About.proof: Our track record includes CivicAlert, a civic AI reporting platform deployed across UK local authorities — proof that we build things that scale.
About.cta: Book a free 15-minute call. No commitment.

FAQ.title: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.q1: How much does a website cost?
FAQ.a1: Our websites start from £600 for a landing page up to £15,000+ for a full corporate platform. Every project gets a personalised quote. We also serve Italian clients with pricing in EUR.
FAQ.q2: Do you work with Italian companies?
FAQ.a2: Yes. We operate across both UK and Italy. We handle IT and EN content, UK GDPR and EU GDPR compliance, and billing in both GBP and EUR.
FAQ.q3: What is a free site audit?
FAQ.a3: A 15-minute call where we review your current site and tell you exactly what's stopping it from converting. No strings attached. Book via the contact form.
FAQ.q4: How long does a website project take?
FAQ.a4: Landing pages: 1–2 weeks. Full websites: 4–8 weeks. E-commerce: 6–12 weeks. Mobile apps: 3–6 months depending on complexity.
FAQ.a5: Next.js, React Native, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Supabase, and AI integrations (OpenAI, Google Vision). We choose the right tool for each project, not the trendy one.

FinalCTA.headline: Ready to turn your site into a client machine?
FinalCTA.subheadline: Book a free 15-minute audit call. We'll tell you exactly what's holding your site back — no commitment, no sales pitch.
